plugins.photosPermission: Allow DRTS Driver App to access your photos so you can attach delivery proof images.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow DRTS Driver App to access your camera so you can capture delivery proof images.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow DRTS Driver App to access your location while a trip is active so it can calculate trip distance and duration.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow DRTS Driver App to keep using your location for active-trip heartbeat updates even when the app is backgrounded.
